admin_home_desc: Manage your guild, check events, and keep your adventurers organized.
where_legends: Donde se forjan leyendas y las amistades duran para siempre
not_affiliated: Not affiliated with Eyedentity Games or PlayPark. For fans, by fans.
made_with_love: Made with ❤️ for the Dragon Nest SEA Community
dragon_quote: "A dragon is only as strong as the guild that stands behind it."
application_reviewed: Las solicitudes se revisan en 24 horas. ¡Nos comunicaremos con usted a través de su información de contacto!

philippines_premier: 🇵🇭 Philippines' Premier Community of Adventurers, Warriors & Friends
epic_raids_desc: Tackle the hardest dungeons and nests together.
pvp_desc: Test your skills in guild battles, PvP tournaments, and ladder climbing. Glory awaits the brave!
fun_events_desc: Weekly guild events, costume contests, treasure hunts, and more. There's always something exciting happening!
community_desc: Join our Discord, make friends, share tips, and enjoy a welcoming environment where everyone matters.
guides_desc: New to Dragon Nest? Our veterans are here to help with builds, rotations, gearing, and progression.
achievements_desc: Celebrate milestones together—guild level ups, rare drops, and personal victories. Your success is our success!
